scripts.preview: CLOUDFLARE_ENV=dev astro build && wrangler dev -e dev
scripts.deploy:dev: CLOUDFLARE_ENV=dev astro build && wrangler deploy -e dev
scripts.deploy:production: CLOUDFLARE_ENV=production astro build && wrangler deploy -e production
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB -e dev --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote:dev: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB -e dev --remote
scripts.db:migrate:remote:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB -e production --remote
